# `Abs`

**Systems:** MOS6502, M68000, M6809, Z80  
**Parameters:** `ib`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>[byte] = Abs( [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte] - the value to convert</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Returns the absolute value of the argument.  For example -1 ( %11111111 ) will become 1.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>

</code>
